items.description: MA trades below key SMAs despite strong digital growth and earnings outlook. Should investors wait?

items.title: Futu Holdings Soars 98% in a Year: Should You Buy the FUTU Stock?
items.description: FUTU's global client surge, soaring assets and trading volumes sharpen the case for its fast-rising, seemingly undervalued stock.

items.title: Airlines set for a smoother 2026, BMO says
items.description: Investing.com -- BMO Capital Markets has initiated coverage on the U.S. airline sector with a constructive outlook for 2026, arguing that the industry is finally emerging from “a challenging 2024–2025” marked by excess domestic capacity and weak corporate travel.

items.title: Leverage on the Rocks: Can Gen Z & Millennials Keep AmEx Premium?
items.description: AXP leans on leverage and rising Gen Z and Millennial adoption to fuel returns while preserving its premium edge.
